title: hupakouo #5219
definition:
1) to listen, to harken
    1a) of one who on the knock at the door comes to listen who it is,
        (the duty of a porter)
 2) to harken to a command
    2a) to obey, be obedient to, submit to
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to listen, attend to:
